def positive_sentinel_default_value_overlaps_valid_business_value():
    rule_id = "sentinel_default_value_overlaps_valid_business_value"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag APIs whose sentinel or fallback value can also be a valid domain value."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
